name: Build Hineni Command Center Dashboard
description: Built React + TypeScript + Vite + shadcn/ui dashboard with 4 tabs: Overview, Code HQ, Social Media, Mission Control. Deployed to Cloudflare Pages.

name: Deploy Cloudflare Workers API
description: Set up Cloudflare Workers with KV storage for dashboard backend. Endpoints for tasks, activity, agents, social, PRs, issues.

name: Set up Aiden agent (@EA_Aiden_bot)
description: Configured second Telegram agent 'Aiden' with separate workspace, shared Hineni memory via symlinked hineni-shared/ directory.
result: Aiden bot live on Telegram, paired with sender 906052367

name: Install local model fleet (4 models)
description: Downloaded and registered qwen3:8b, qwen2.5-coder:7b, deepseek-r1:8b, gemma3:4b. Patched gateway config.

name: Install coding tools (Aider, Claude Code, Codex)
description: Installed Aider v0.86.1, Claude Code v2.1.39, OpenAI Codex CLI. Set up Python 3.12 venv.

name: Security audit & hardening
description: OpenClaw security audit (0 critical, 2 warn fixed), chmod 700 on credentials, daily security cron job set up.
result: All warnings resolved. Daily 8 AM EST audit cron active.

name: Fix exposed GitHub PAT in git remotes
description: Removed GitHub PAT from hineni-dashboard-pages and bob-dashboard-pages git remote URLs. Moved password to secrets/.
result: PAT removed from remotes. Still needs rotation by Yaakov.

name: TikTok analytics deep dive
description: Analyzed @hineni.auditions TikTok: 7 followers, 58 likes, ~1,775 total views across 15 videos. Average ~110 views/video.
result: Full metrics captured. Heavy promo content, low engagement. Needs educational/BTS content.

name: Instagram analytics & content audit
description: Audited @hineni.auditions IG: 19 followers, 13 posts (mostly Reels), heavy promotional content.
result: Need more educational/social proof content. Competitor analysis revealed Actors Access gap.

name: Competitor analysis (Backstage, Casting Networks, Actors Access)
description: Deep competitor research: Backstage 735K followers, Casting Networks 143K, Actors Access 50.6K. AA has weak social = opportunity.
result: Key insight: Actors Access poor social presence is a gap to exploit.

name: Create content batch (3 posts)
description: Created Monday Motivation, Discover Me Push, and Pain Point content with Canva-style HTML templates.
result: 3 post templates ready for review. Added to social dashboard.

name: Set up Ollama + local models
description: Installed Ollama v0.15.5 via Homebrew, downloaded Llama 3 8B and Qwen 2.5 7B models.
result: Ollama running, local model inference working

name: Account signups (Figma, Notion, ElevenLabs)
description: Signed up for Figma, Notion, and ElevenLabs using Google OAuth.

name: Code review: hineni-web frontend
description: Full frontend code review. Grade: B. Found 354 'any' types, 681 console.logs, zero tests.

name: Code review: hineni-server backend
description: Full backend code review. Grade: B. Critical: CORS defaults, ALLOWED_HOSTS, DEBUG settings.

name: QA scan of live site
description: 8 QA scans completed. Site stable. 4 UI items, 5 suggestions outstanding.
result: Report at reports/hineni-qa-report.md. 401 session error found.

name: Prepare SEO/OG tags PR
description: Added OG tags, Twitter Card, canonical URL, improved title for hineni-web.

name: Create shared Hineni memory system
description: Set up hineni-shared/ directory with TEAM-POLICY.md, symlinked into both Bob and Aiden workspaces.

name: Dashboard major update: Task Board + Action Items + Social enhancements
description: Adding Task Board (Jira-like kanban/table), Action Items tab, enhanced Social Media with TikTok/LinkedIn/Content Calendar.

name: Write LinkedIn article on casting tech
description: Wrote article on how technology is transforming the casting industry for LinkedIn.

name: Deploy rate limiting to production
description: Implemented and deployed rate limiting on hineni-server.

name: Schedule TikTok posts for Valentine's campaign
description: Created and scheduled Valentine's Day themed TikTok content.
